basic_details.job_title: Anna University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Project Associate/ Technical Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Associate/Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website www.annauniv.edu. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the Anna University Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Planning, Bachelor's Degree in Planning, HSC or Equivalent with working knowledge in MS-Office
qualification.details: Project Associate - II: Essential: Master's Degree in Planning. Desirable: 2 Years of experience in Planning. Project Associate - I: Essential: Bachelor's Degree in Planning. Technical Assistant: Essential: HSC or Equivalent with working knowledge in MS-Office. Desirable: 1 Year of working experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Anna University Project Associate/Technical Assistant posts is 16th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate/Technical Assistant posts?
faq.answer: A total of 10 vacancies are available for the Project Associate and Technical Assistant positions at Anna University. These vacancies are distributed among different categories as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate - II?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification for the Project Associate - II post is a Master's Degree in Planning. A desirable qualification includes 2 years of experience in Planning.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Technical Assistant post ranges from Rs. 12,000/- to Rs. 15,000/- per month, depending on the experience and qualifications of the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate/Technical Assistant posts at Anna University will involve shortlisting of applications followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as instructed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job location for these posts is Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits, nor does it detail any age relaxation policies. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise details.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can click on the link to download the detailed notification.
